programme.title: The Closer: The Last Word
programme.desc: A young street hustler sees what appears to be a man burying a woman in Griffith Park prompting an investigation Brenda is convinced will lead to Philip Stroh.

programme.title: The Closer: Pilot
programme.desc: The new head of the Priority Murder Squad investigates the murder of an unknown woman.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: As the squad investigates the death of a second woman related to the Tackles case, and a new theory materializes, Sharon faces a health setback. Meanwhile, Gus reacts unexpectedly to Rusty's partial solution to their ongoing relationship problems.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: While working two seemingly connected murders, the division suddenly uncovers a series of sexual assaults against servers from Tackles. As a new theory about the killer gathers steam, an unexpected twist throws Major Crimes and Sharon off-balance.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Sharon must make decisions related to her ongoing health problems while arriving at the solution of a series of murders and sexual assaults.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: A surprise death in the law enforcement community seems to be the work of escaped serial killer, Phillip Stroh. Ricky helps the division with a difficult search for a Mr. and Mrs. Bechtal, and Emily Raydor offers Rusty some sound advice.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: Unable to locate Stroh in the present, the squad looks for answers in his past, hunting for the former Ms. Bechtal. Meanwhile, the squad struggles with Chief Mason, and Rusty grows frustrated with forced proximity to Gus.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Fatal Fence Feud
programme.desc: Even after Lonnie Paul Tracey erected a giant barricade between him and his neighbor Tony Davis, no one ever dreamed their ongoing arguments would escalate to murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl
programme.desc: When a mother and recovering addict is stabbed while standing up to the neighborhood bully, grainy video and unreliable witnesses stand in the way of investigators determining who was holding the knife that killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Iceman: The Murder Business Part 1
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to his neighbors, Richard Kuklinski held a dark secret: he was the 'Iceman,' a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Iceman: Trapping a Serial Killer Part 2
programme.desc: For many years, 'The Iceman' Richard Kuklinski had literally gotten away with murder, but now investigators were on to him. There was very little evidence, connecting The Iceman to his crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Genghis Khan's Tomb
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Mongolia's 'forbidden zone' to find Genghis Khan's tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Mystic Monument

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Extra Mile
programme.desc: Drew visits a retro business in Norfolk to Pembroke, where a 150-year-old church has been transformed into an antiques business selling everything from Victorian pine to classic 60s furniture.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Private Passions
programme.desc: Drew visits a collection of American automobiles that includes Evel Knievel's Messerschmitt.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Fresh to Market
programme.desc: Drew is in the Cotswolds where he finds a stash of Indian and Afghan treasures.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Tour de France
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard and John Tee search for antique chic in France.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: British Gems
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard checks out factories in the Midlands.

programme.title: Unearthed: Treasures of the Terracotta Army
programme.desc: The Terracotta Army is one of China's greatest treasures, but there are still dark secrets surrounding this super-tomb. Newly discovered artifacts reveal the soldiers' supernatural enemy, and human remains point to ancient China's violent origins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of the Colosseum
programme.desc: New evidence uncovers the ancient mysteries behind the iconic Colosseum. Archaeologists uncover the secret lives of the gladiators and make new discoveries that help explain the rise and sudden fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Desert
programme.desc: The ancient city of Petra, a city carved from desert rock, has baffled experts for decades. Now, new technologies resurrect the city and reveal why the spectacular civilization was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: The Inca capital of Cusco was said to be the site of untold gold and riches, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the secrets behind this mighty empire's fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Volcano Temple
programme.desc: The Pantheon is a 2,000-year-old temple with a dark secret; today, using cutting-edge archaeological methods and brand-new evidence, experts look beneath the streets of Rome to find out why it was built and how it survived so long.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Alaskans Unite
programme.desc: Marty commits the family to a quick mini-rescue in the community. Misty must complete her cabin roof without Maciah. And when Marty gives a cabin-warming gift to Mollee, he must figure out how to transport it to the Upper 20.

programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.desc: John fears the large lump on his neck could become so big that it may eventually suffocate him. Shoshana is depressed because of the big growth on her forehead. Ashley hopes Dr. Lee can provide some relief from her three painful skin conditions.

programme.desc: Elisha's blisters itch from head to toe, Dave's lipomas cover his body, Ryan's rare skin disease could affect him into adulthood, and Chelsea's lump on the back of her neck isn't a lipoma.

programme.desc: Elisha's blisters itch from head to toe, Dave's lipomas cover his body, Ryan's rare skin disease could affect him into adulthood, and Chelsea's lump on the back of her neck isn't a lipoma.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Quasimodo No Mo'

programme.desc: Hannah's rash is unpredictable and painful, a different Hannah's hands and feet are covered in blisters, Samantha's cyst is one of the largest Dr. Emma has seen, and Mariah is back in Dr. Emma's office to treat scarring from her acne.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A Thanksgiving Ultimatum

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Holiday Hangover
programme.desc: Jonah is the first Johnston to turn 21, and it's Christmas time in the household. While Trent and Amber try to make the holiday merry, the adult kids living at home is causing tension in the family.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Any Place But Home
programme.desc: Tensions between Trent and Amber and their children Jonah, Anna and Liz continue to grow, pushing the kids to ramp up their efforts to leave the house. Then, things explode when Amber presses Anna for details on her plans to move out.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti
programme.desc: Meet Jyoti Amge, the smallest woman in the world. At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, Jyoti is in the U.S. for work and to explore American culture. She also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue her two broken legs.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dominique's severe addiction to food prevented her from losing enough pounds to have weight loss surgery. This single mom of six continues to struggle with her diet.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen
programme.desc: Justin Williamson is a teenager who weighs 670 lbs and is chasing his musical dreams while fighting for his life. Faced with death or surgery, Justin must transform.

programme.desc: Tommy wants to lose weight so he can marry his fiancée and have the life he always dreamed of with her, but to break the cycle of pathological eating that left him nearly bed-bound, he'll have to face a piece of his past he has always kept secret.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley B's Story
programme.desc: At 600lbs, Ashley had to move home so her mom could help her care for not just herself but her newborn daughter too. Now Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston to find a way to go on living.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley D's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 700 pounds at 26 years old, Ashley's life is in danger. Ashamed of her body, she mostly hides at home. After bypass surgery, Ashley confronts medical setbacks and struggles to get past the trauma that ignited her eating disorder.

programme.desc: A high school student uses a rumour about losing her virginity to raise her social standing and make money.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates

programme.title: Siesta Key: I Can't Help if Someone is Attracted to Me
programme.desc: Juliette and Sam's vacation is threatened by Jordana's flirtation. Brandon tries to rebound after Camilla, but no one is happy about it. Everyone misses Chloe. Juliette and Kelsey try to navigate how to co-exist on an island.

programme.desc: Brody and Heidi's friendship is at a crossroads after dinner turns into an explosive argument. While Brody wonders if Amber is right for him, Audrina's first kiss with Sean leaves her with more questions. Justin starts to open up to the group.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Weather Wipeouts

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Phobias

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Inventions

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe try to find house sitters for bizarre homes and pose as researchers studying grocery shopping habits. Later, the big loser has a run-in at the drive-thru with astonished customers.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Wes-Defying Stunt

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Continues
programme.desc: After coming closer than ever to proving the existence of Bigfoot in Oregon, the team continues their search in the mountains of Kentucky. They'll spend the next two and a half weeks in search of Sasquatch, unless it finds them first.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Call and Response

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Creepy Hollows

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Hand of the Beast

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Time's Running Out

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Quest Out West

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Dark Memories

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Every Which Way But Goose
programme.desc: Tina, discouraged by not being asked to prom by Jimmy Jr., forms an unhealthy attachment to a goose from the nearby park. Meanwhile, Linda joins a dating app to help Gretchen find a match.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Fresh Princ-ipal
programme.desc: Things get out of hand when Louise wins a contest to be Principal for a Day. Back at the restaurant, Teddy has a unique suggestion to help Bob when he suddenly finds himself unable to flip burgers.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Roamin' Bob-iday
programme.desc: The family forces workaholic Bob to take a much-needed day off, only for him to wind up working at a local sandwich shop. Meanwhile, Linda and the kids throw a last-minute baby shower at the restaurant for a female biker group.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: What About Blob?
programme.desc: Gene convinces Tina and Louise to help him save a misunderstood plankton blob from being destroyed by a yacht club.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: If You Love It So Much, Why Don't You Marionette?
programme.desc: The kids visit a marionette theater for a school field trip and Louise gets on the theater owner's bad side. Meanwhile, Bob takes pity on a flyer guy who's handing out flyers in front of the restaurant.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri-Da
programme.desc: Peter and his friends are sick of forgetting the million-dollar business ideas they come up with while drinking, so they strap on Joe's police body cams to record their every move.

programme.title: Family Guy: Undergrounded
programme.desc: Peter secretly gets a credit card and overspends the family money, so Lois grounds him. To plan the perfect escape, he builds a tunnel leading directly to The Drunken Clam.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Exploits a Miracle
programme.desc: When a leaky pipe creates a water stain on the wall at Paddy's that resembles the likeness of the Virgin Mary, the gang argues over the best way to exploit their little 'miracle.'

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Runs for Office
programme.desc: The gang explores the corrupt world of local Philly politics when Frank explains how easy it is to elicit bribes from politicians.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Goes America All Over Everybody's Ass
programme.desc: While the gang debates the constitutionality of various bans on people's rights, Mac and Dennis decide to turn Paddy's into a freedom zone with no restrictions or rules, and quickly discover the disadvantages of having too much freedom.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dennis and Dee Get a New Dad
programme.desc: Dee receives numerous e-mails from a stranger claiming to be her father. She arranges a family dinner with Frank and Barbara to get the truth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: Michigan's hot summer is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals. A think blanket of humidity is making it hard for Dr. Pol and Charles to save a newborn calf with pneumonia. Meanwhile, Dr. Brenda helps a stubborn pig give birth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Red, White and Moo
programme.desc: Before enjoying the fourth of July, Dr. Pol must take care of the animals. Brenda prescribes anti-anxiety medication to a puppy so she can get through the fireworks and Dr. Pol tries to help a very sick dog in distress.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: What's Up, Doc?
programme.desc: The Pol clinic helps a guineau pig with some attitude, some piglets that are having trouble eating, and Hope the calf with a dislocated hip. Later, Dr. Pol is convinced to judge a chilli cookoff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair brings a lot of animals to the clinic for last minute checkups by Dr. Pol and his team before they are shown at the 4-H competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Jingle Pols
programme.desc: It’s time to get into the Christmas spirit Pol style as Dr. Pol and Charles take a look back at some of the best moments from this season of The Incredible Dr. Pol.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Polnado Warning
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is busy with patients when the tornado sirens start blaring. The whole clinic, including pets and owners must head to the basement for their safety and ride out the storm.

programme.title: The Nature of Things: Kingdom of the Polar Bears: Part 1
programme.desc: Veteran polar bear guide Dennis Compayre goes on a remarkable journey, providing a rare and intimate glimpse into the world of a polar bear mom and her newborn cubs as they leave the safety of their den for the first time.

programme.title: The Nature of Things: Kingdom of the Polar Bears: Part 2
programme.desc: Veteran polar bear guide, Dennis Compayre watches as a mother bear teaches her young cubs to hunt and discovers how they are struggling to adapt to a rapidly warming Arctic.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: The Living Edens: Denali, Alaska's Great Wilderness
programme.desc: Tracking a year in the life of Alaska's Mount McKinley.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Gravitational Waves Revealed
programme.desc: Gravitational waves are helping scientists explore the cosmos in revolutionary, new ways, and the discoveries they make are revealing the universe's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret Lives of Neutrinos
programme.desc: Neutrinos are the most mysterious particles in the universe, and they power some of the most explosive events in the cosmos; new discoveries reveal how these ghosts pass through objects undetected and why they could be the reason we exist.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Curse of the White Dwarf
programme.desc: White dwarfs are small, dead stars with a dangerous side, capable of exploding into supernovas and destroying planets; new research suggests these mysterious phenomena may be the key to understanding the universe itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies
programme.desc: Galaxies are locked in continual combat across the universe, and our own Milky Way will face its biggest opponent ever, the Andromeda Galaxy, in a titanic and deadly struggle that could create a new and unrecognizable super galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Alien Worlds
programme.desc: An explosion in the discovery of exoplanets is challenging everything we know about our universe; experts use cutting-edge astronomy to investigate these mysterious alien worlds and how they defy the laws of physics.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The New Explorers
programme.desc: A new breed of intrepid explorers are risking their careers and lives to lead humanity to worlds never seen. Now, discover the missions behind capturing the first images of Pluto along with those who dare to uncover the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Alien Worlds
programme.desc: An explosion in the discovery of exoplanets is challenging everything we know about our universe; experts use cutting-edge astronomy to investigate these mysterious alien worlds and how they defy the laws of physics.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The New Explorers
programme.desc: A new breed of intrepid explorers are risking their careers and lives to lead humanity to worlds never seen. Now, discover the missions behind capturing the first images of Pluto along with those who dare to uncover the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies
programme.desc: Galaxies are locked in continual combat across the universe, and our own Milky Way will face its biggest opponent ever, the Andromeda Galaxy, in a titanic and deadly struggle that could create a new and unrecognizable super galaxy.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: High-Wire Hell
programme.desc: Working thousands of feet above the California desert, brave engineers and fearless crews perform perilous high-wire acts to keep the hi-tech tramway system operating safely for the hundreds of daily tourists it transports.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Storm Surge Emergency
programme.desc: When sea levels rise, storm surge barriers work overtime to fight off devastating floods. To get this tough job done, a team of experts maintain these engineering marvels to prevent catastrophe and keep millions of people safe.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Ice Bridge Nightmare
programme.desc: A determined team of expert technicians battle nature's destructive force to keep one of the world's longest road bridges open in deadly conditions.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Dog Days of Murder
programme.desc: When Billings, Montana firefighters respond to a duplex consumed in flames, two bound and gagged bodies are found inside. With their housemate nowhere to be found, police aren't sure if they're searching for the killer or another victim.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Stuck in the Middle
programme.desc: When Paula Cardwell returns from running errands, she finds her 20-year-old daughter, Anna Catherine, lying dead on the kitchen floor. The small town of Wetumpka, Alabama, is left stunned and determined to find the devil in their midst.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: What's in the Backpack?
programme.desc: Robert Sharp is a retired professor living in Ann Arbor, Michigan, and the last person, anyone would expect to be murdered. But when he turns up brutally stabbed and burned, Robert's final moments make police wonder who could have done this and why.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Cover the Camera and I'll Talk
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in Virginia's Isle of Wight County discovers a double homicide involving an 80-year-old disabled grandmother. An undercover informant, a hidden handgun, and an unusual confession all lead to convictions in this cold-blooded crime.

programme.title: See No Evil: Four and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Larry Howse is a dedicated father of two sons. But in August 2013, Larry is found shot dead in his apartment's parking garage in Tacoma, Washington. Police have little to go on until a security camera reveals grainy footage of two mystery assailants.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Night Apart
programme.desc: A night of celebration ends in horror when 29-year-old Adrianne Robert is found dead by her roommate. Police retrace Adrianne's footsteps and discover the club she visited is equipped with security cameras.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Cover the Camera and I'll Talk
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in Virginia's Isle of Wight County discovers a double homicide involving an 80-year-old disabled grandmother. An undercover informant, a hidden handgun, and an unusual confession all lead to convictions in this cold-blooded crime.

programme.title: See No Evil: Four and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Larry Howse is a dedicated father of two sons. But in August 2013, Larry is found shot dead in his apartment's parking garage in Tacoma, Washington. Police have little to go on until a security camera reveals grainy footage of two mystery assailants.

programme.title: See No Evil: Fire Angel
programme.desc: When she interrupts a burglary at home, Diane Pranske is abducted and left for dead across state lines. Detectives turn to surveillance video to find her assailant.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Let Go
programme.desc: A woman believes she may finally be free of her possessive ex-boyfriend, but months later, now in a new relationship, she can't help but feel she's being watched. The stalker's true identity is not at all what she imagined.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Shoeprints in the Mud
programme.desc: An innocent trip to the store ends in tragedy when the body of Linda Strait is found along the Spokane River. But with no eyewitnesses, detectives have their work cut out for them. They'll spend the rest of their careers searching for the ruthless killer.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: White Hot Rage
programme.desc: When a man with no enemies and few friends is viciously murdered in a quiet neighborhood of Calgary, Detective Peter Bakers struggles to determine who could have done it.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: This One's Yours
programme.desc: Det. Pam Dunklin's first homicide as lead investigator begins one balmy summer afternoon when beloved local bartender, Jeff Joplin, is found beaten, strangled and stabbed to death on the floor of his home near Horseshoe Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Killing Fields
programme.desc: As Detective Rasco digs deeper into the death of an army reserve sergeant, plenty of folk may have wanted to see his demise.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Churchside Killer
programme.desc: Single mother of two, Kenyadda Patterson, works two jobs and goes to college at night in addition to raising her children. When she is discovered murdered, detectives hunt down the killer, and discover he's closer to her than they could imagine.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Nose Job Murder
programme.desc: A young lawyer fails to show up for a blind date. He's been shot to death in his apartment. And another woman freely admits she pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Master Key Murder
programme.desc: The charming town of Macon, GA panics when Mercer Law grad Lauren Giddings is murdered on campus. Detectives uncover multiple suspects with motive and means. But only one person in the group is sadistic enough to kill.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fireworks on Fury Lane
programme.desc: A firefighter moves into a family-friendly neighbourhood with his wife and child, but the rambunctious teens living next door drive him over the edge.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Israeli Commandos
programme.desc: Israeli Commandos are the most battle hardened military elite in the world. There's a commando unit for every type of mission, from hostage rescue to pre-emptive strike, all practiced to the point of perfection.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Weaponology: Israeli Commandos
programme.desc: Israeli Commandos are the most battle hardened military elite in the world. There's a commando unit for every type of mission, from hostage rescue to pre-emptive strike, all practiced to the point of perfection.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Five Alarm Chili
programme.desc: After an arsonist set fire to her home, Chili has a contractor pushed on her by her insurance company. His solution is to paint over the damage, ignoring her concerns. Chili contacts Mike for help and he's determined to make it right.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountaintop Luxury Lagoon
programme.desc: The Leasure family's new house in the hills above Folsom, CA, comes with breathtaking lakeside views, and their big pool dreams will make it a perfect home. But rocky soil and tricky plumbing designs create a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Backyard Water Park
programme.desc: Brian and Paul Porter double the fun by giving a family not one, but two new pools. From a 60-foot slide and a sunken spa to a lazy river, the family gets a backyard water park that everyone can enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fairground Showdown
programme.desc: In this all-star episode of Carnival Eats, host Noah Cappe visits California, home to some of the biggest and best fair in America.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Twisted Creations
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a tour from coast to coast sampling some of the craziest creations around. These fairground vendors have combined two iconic treats into one revolutionary new midway masterpiece.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking bites down on the 15 best crunchy, crispy and crackling dishes. Nachos, pizzas, fried chicken, tacos and desserts are represented. Chefs offer recipes and tips on making the crispiest skin, the crunchiest chips and the most-crumbly crusts.

programme.desc: Annie wonders why Pony is celebrating. And, Pony gets to go to school after being named class pet.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Day Without Tears/ Summer Job
programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Employee of the Month/ Brocrastination
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce have to take care of a pile of dirty dishes, before it takes care of them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom /Welcome to Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. Then, SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Brendar the Barbarian
programme.desc: Brendar is expelled from the Royal Order of Warrior Princesses, and is left as a 'feared and revered' Barbarian.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mega Bounce Battle/ Gossip Guy
programme.desc: The boys disobey Dave's orders to not play a dangerous game then have to hide their injuries when they get hurt.The school newspaper has a sudden increase in sales when a gossip column appears poking fun at other students.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: 9 Lives/ Dread 'N' Breakfast
programme.desc: Timmy tries to find Catman a safer job; Dad quits his job so the Turner's have no income.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadlantis/ Chloe Rules!
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe become eco-warriors when they save the underwater city of Atlantis from a dangerous 'sea monster.' Timmy regrets wishing Chloe was the school hall monitor when he sees how seriously she takes the job.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dimmsdale Tales
programme.desc: Dad takes the Squirrely Scouts on a camping trip and forgets all the supplies. Timmy tries to make the most of their trip by telling a collection of scary stories around a campfire.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roadie to Nowhere/ A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: The Loud House: Read Aloud/ Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate. When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story
programme.desc: Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter named Liam set out on destroying him. He must find a way to defeat this foe, rescue Doofenshmirtz from the error of his ways and save himself.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Blessious This Messious
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Doonkleberry Imperative/ Buford Confidential
programme.desc: The boys go out in search of Doonkelberries so that Mom can make her famous pie.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sleepwalk Surprise/ Sci-Fi Pie Fly
programme.desc: Candace's plans to hang out with Jeremy are derailed after he becomes interested in playing a new game. Phineas and Ferbs create their own flying saucer to help solve a mystery.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Time Crisis/ Gramma Driver
programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Chipocalypse Now
programme.desc: Chip Whistler tears down the buildings around the Greens' house to build a new Wholesome Foods store.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Robot Fight Club
programme.desc: Chase and Leo enter a local 'create-your-own battle bot' competition where they hope to defeat the returning champion.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo vs. Evil
programme.desc: Leo follows Marcus to his secret lair to gather evidence that proves he’s bionic but ends up captured by Marcus.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: With Douglas now revealed as Marcus' master, the two infiltrate Davenport's lab and capture Davenport with plans on using him to lure Bree, Chase, and Adam.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: Now alone, except for Eddy, Leo must figure out how to rescue Davenport and the Lab Rats. Eddy shares with Leo Davenport's secret room in the lab where all of his most powerful inventions are stored.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Avalanche!
programme.desc: Chase heads to the Arctic to retrieve rare minerals that Davenport needs for an invention, but finds himself trapped in an avalanche.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Perry 2.0
programme.desc: Principal Perry gets the idea to create a robotic version of herself that will help her patrol the students.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Llama Drama
programme.desc: When the school mascot's costume is stolen by the rival team, Adam seeks revenge by taking their mascot, a llama.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Hole in One
programme.desc: The Lab Rats ruin a multi-million dollar painting and attempt to get away with forging it, but when it doesn't work they must try to retrieve the original.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Adam Up
programme.desc: In an effort to get out of training duties, Adam enlists Leo's help to create a duplicate Adam using Davenport's experimental cloning device.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Memory Wipe
programme.desc: After coming home with a poor report card, Leo uses Davenport's award-winning memory erasing device to wipe Davenport's short term memory but inadvertently erases 25 years, rendering him a teenager.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Trucked Out
programme.desc: Adam closes a deal for a monster truck and sets out to stash it in the school parking lot.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Prank You Very Much
programme.desc: Bree partners with Tasha on the ultimate prank.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!
programme.desc: In an attempt to humiliate the Victories, Fumiya challenges Dante to a battle that will be broadcast around the country.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Reba: Reba Works for Brock

programme.title: Reba: It's Jake's Party, Cry If You Want To

programme.title: Reba: Safe Dating

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One for the Money
programme.desc: Dorothy and Sophia flashback to their purchase of the family's first television in 1954.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bringing Up Baby

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: The girls hire a new housekeeper and she puts a curse on their house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nothing to Fear But Fear Itself

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Letter to Gorbachev

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Blanche is exposed in the newspaper entering the home of a local married politician.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Vanessa Fixed Up Eve
programme.desc: Vanessa plays matchmaker for Eve and sets her up with one of her students, not realizing Eve may already be going out with someone else. Meanwhile, Mike and Chuck suspect Eve is secretly dating Chuck’s son, Brandon.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Mike and Ed take Ryan and his supposedly ailing dad on their hunting trip. Victor admits he wasn't truthful about his reasons for finally coming to see Ryan. Meanwhile, Vanessa tries to get more family members to attend Ryan and Kristin's wedding.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Wolf Returns
programme.desc: Mike has returned from being on a fantastic two-month road trip travelling to far-flung places for Outdoor Man. It's great to be back with his wife, Vanessa, and their three daughters, but he finds a lot has been going on at home since he's been away.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Free Range Parents
programme.desc: Amidst the mass chaos of picking up Boyd from school, Mike asks a reluctant Ryan to let Boyd walk home unsupervised. Meanwhile, Ed and Kyle hold a 'Doomsday Preppers' meeting, and Eve and Mandy try to keep a secret from Vanessa.

programme.title: The Middle: The Test
programme.desc: Frankie forces Axl to focus on his future when she learns that the school PSATs are around the corner and he hasn't even begun to study for them. Sue tries out for a school activity that isn't exactly a perfect fit.

programme.title: The Middle: Bad Choices
programme.desc: As the Heck home begins to literally fall apart, Frankie and Mike consider leaving homeownership behind and moving the family to an apartment. Axl tries to fake Frankie out by pretending that he is sick in order to get out of taking a school test.

programme.title: The Middle: Halloween II
programme.desc: After being embarrassed over wearing a childish costume at a high school Halloween party and being ignored by the guys, Sue asks a flabbergasted Mike for his advice on what boys want when it comes to girls.

programme.title: The Middle: Heck's Best Thing
programme.desc: Frankie and Mike are convinced that Axl will blow his interview with a football scout, which could earn him a scholarship to college. Sue and Brick begin a texting marathon when they discover that Aunt Edie accidentally gave them her cellphone.

programme.title: Reba: Ring-a-Ding
programme.desc: Reba invites her new beau Brian home to meet her family. Brock and the children attend Barbra Jean's family reunion.

programme.title: Reba: Ring-a-Ding

programme.title: Reba: Cookies for Santa

programme.title: Reba: A Moment in Time
programme.desc: Feelings are hurt when the Harts create a video time capsule for Elizabeth.

programme.title: The Office: A.A.R.M.

programme.title: The Office: Health Care
programme.desc: When Corporate wants Michael to pick a cheaper health plan for his employees, Michael shirks responsibility and Dwight happily accepts the task. Delighted with his new position of power, Dwight manages to offend everyone.

programme.title: The Office: The Dundies

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Bobby Brown, Natasha Leggero, Paul Scheer
programme.desc: Caleb Hearon organizes Hands Across America 2, Bobby Brown deals with a painful rat problem, and Paul Scheer gets a frozen tongue from an ultra-cold smoothie.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.title: South Park: Faith Hilling
programme.desc: The kids are in danger when new trends start to evolve and shift at a rapid pace.

programme.title: South Park: A Boy and a Priest
programme.desc: A very special relationship has developed between Butters and the Parish Priest. When the town finds the church doors locked and no sign of the pair, they call in the Catholic Church.

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping
programme.desc: Cartman considers himself the top online restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Poor and Stupid
programme.desc: Cartman dreams of becoming a NASCAR driver and he's willing to do whatever it takes to make it happen, even if that means giving up all of his toys and money.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat
programme.desc: When the boys find out that their favourite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to 'Save Films from their Directors.'

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Australia: Australia

programme.title: Military Makeover: Daniels Family: Episode 3
programme.desc: Homes and lives of veterans across the country are transformed by a team of experts.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Do You Know?
programme.desc: Cristina imagines the two routes her life can take based on one decision she makes. Meanwhile one of the hospital's patients decides whether or not to live.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: You Be Illin
programme.desc: The hospital gets inundated with flu-infected patients, which causes the doctors to slowly fall ill one by one. Derek must fight off the sickness as he prepares to give a speech on brain mapping and the residents place bets on who will fall ill first.

programme.title: The Closer: About Face
programme.desc: A movie star's wife is found dead; Brenda finds herself rattled trying to get around L.A.

programme.title: The Closer: The Big Picture
programme.desc: The team investigates when big names are found to be clients of a murdered prostitute.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: Phillip Stroh and his young British accomplice edge closer and close to their end game, while Lt. Provenza continues to push Asst. Chief Leo Mason into pouring more resources into the case. Rusty digs up an important clue.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: In the series finale, Lt. Tao is stuck in a room with a potential bomb. Provenza finally identifies the real Ms. Bechtal, and Major Crimes comes face-to-face for the very last time with Phillip Stroh.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reloaded
programme.desc: There is little time for adjustment for the newly appointed head of Major Crimes, when the department is rushing to reach a plea regarding a string of grocery store robberies that turns fatal. Meanwhile, Raydor takes a big step to protect Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Before and After
